<h1 align="center">Word Office</h1>

<p align="center"><strong>Your sovereign office suite.</strong></p>

---

## What is Word Office?

Word Office is an independent, open-source document editing suite built from scratch in Rust and React. It provides a truly open, transparent, and sovereign solution for collaborative document editing.

Word Office is designed as a web-based component that integrates into platforms like Nextcloud, XWiki, OpenProject, and others.

### Key Features

- Edit **DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, PDF, ODT, ODS, ODP, TXT** and many more formats
- Real-time collaborative editing
- Modern web interface with mobile and desktop apps in development

## Community

Word Office is developed openly by a community of individuals and organizations. Current contributors include:

- IONOS · Nextcloud · EuroStack · XWiki · OpenProject · Proton · Soverin · Abilian · BTactic

## Get Involved

File issues, propose pull requests, and help us build the best open-source office suite.
